title: The monday.com apps roadshow: the Upscale guide to 'Appier Mondays'!

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, monday.com Community!

It’s Amalia here from the monday.com apps team at Upscale

I’m excited to invite you to an upcoming session we’re running next month: **The monday.com apps roadshow: the essential guide to ‘Appier Mondays’.

When:** Wednesday, 22 April 2026 at 11:00 am (BST)
**
Where:** Online, hosted on Zoom
**
Learn more and register here:** https://www.upscale.tech/events/monday-apps-roadshow-webinar?utm_medium=organic&utm_source=monday.com&utm_campaign=upsc_pr_caq_26_monday-apps-roadshow-ups-rt4m_app-partner_web-lp_awn_prs_aho_glob_all_en_
